mapper.select: select t.task_id, t.out_put_poll_id, t.task_date, t.check_frequency, p.execution_standard, t.monitor_unit, ext.unit_name as monitorUnitName, t.task_desc, t.report_name, t.report_code, t.monitor_category, t.sample_date, t.report_date, t.analysis_person, t.contact_person, t.contact_phone, t.status, t.update_time, o.out_put_id, o.out_put_name, o.out_put_type, op.pollutant_code, pc.pollutant_name_cn, pc.pollutant_name_en, op.over_maxValue, op.over_minValue, t.analysis_start_date, t.analysis_end_date, t.sampling_person, t.operation_hour from t_env_manual_check_task t left join t_env_manual_check_plan p on p.out_put_poll_id = t.out_put_poll_id left join t_ent_output_pollutant op on op.out_put_poll_id = t.out_put_poll_id left join t_bas_pollutant_code pc on pc.pollutant_code = op.pollutant_code left join t_ent_out_put_info o on o.out_put_id = op.out_put_id left join t_ext_unit_lib ext on ext.unit_code = t.monitor_unit where t.task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_env_manual_check_task (task_id, out_put_poll_id, task_date, check_frequency) values
(#{task.taskId}, #{task.outPutPollId}, #{task.taskDate}, #{task.checkFrequency})
mapper.update:
insert into t_env_manual_check_task (task_id, status, report_name, report_code, monitor_category, sample_date, report_date, analysis_start_date, analysis_end_date, analysis_person, sampling_person, operation_hour, contact_person, contact_phone) values
(#{task.taskId}, #{task.status}, #{task.reportName}, #{task.reportCode}, #{task.monitorCategory}, #{task.sampleDate}, #{task.reportDate}, #{task.analysisStartDate}, #{task.analysisEndDate}, #{task.analysisPerson}, #{task.samplingPerson}, #{task.operationHour}, #{task.contactPerson}, #{task.contactPhone})
on duplicate key update status = values(status), report_name = values(report_name), report_code = values(report_code), monitor_category = values(monitor_category), sample_date = values(sample_date), report_date = values(report_date), analysis_start_date = values(analysis_start_date), analysis_end_date = values(analysis_end_date), analysis_person = values(analysis_person), sampling_person = values(sampling_person), operation_hour = values(operation_hour), contact_person = values(contact_person), contact_phone = values(contact_phone)
